languages.original_text: "The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."

languages.text: "Святопроцедура Великого Деланья требует благословенного притока Движущей Силы и превосходит в важности незначительные функциональные потребности экипажа, обеспечиваемые отключенными системами. Пара отсеков сможет выдержать десяток вахт без отопления во имя познания".

"The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."
languages.original_text: "Святопроцедура Великого Деланья требует благословенного притока Движущей Силы и превосходит в важности незначительные функциональные потребности экипажа, обеспечиваемые отключенными системами. Пара отсеков сможет выдержать десяток вахт без отопления во имя познания".

"The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."

languages.text: «El proceso sagrado de mi Gran Obra requiere el flujo bendito de la Fuerza Motriz, y es más importante que las necesidades funcionales menores de la tripulación a las que atienden los sistemas desactivados. Un par de compartimentos pueden aguantar unas cuantas guardias sin calefacción en nombre del saber».
languages.original_text: "The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."

traits.locale_text: «El proceso sagrado de mi Gran Obra requiere el flujo bendito de la Fuerza Motriz, y es más importante que las necesidades funcionales menores de la tripulación a las que atienden los sistemas desactivados. Un par de compartimentos pueden aguantar unas cuantas guardias sin calefacción en nombre del saber».

languages.text: 「私の大いなる御業の神聖な工程には、祝福されたモーティヴ・フォースの流入が必要であり、それは停止したシステムが満たしていた乗員のささいな機能的要求よりも、はるかに重要です。区画の二つや三つ、知識の名のもとに、暖房なしで十数回の当直を耐え忍べるはずです」
languages.original_text: "The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."

traits.locale_text: 「私の大いなる御業の神聖な工程には、祝福されたモーティヴ・フォースの流入が必要であり、それは停止したシステムが満たしていた乗員のささいな機能的要求よりも、はるかに重要です。区画の二つや三つ、知識の名のもとに、暖房なしで十数回の当直を耐え忍べるはずです」

languages.text: “我伟大事业的神圣进程需要受祝的源力涌入。那些系统停摆，影响的不过是船员微不足道的功能需求。为了知识，几个舱室多忍受十几轮没有供暖的班次也无妨。”
languages.original_text: "The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."

traits.locale_text: “我伟大事业的神圣进程需要受祝的源力涌入。那些系统停摆，影响的不过是船员微不足道的功能需求。为了知识，几个舱室多忍受十几轮没有供暖的班次也无妨。”

languages.text: "Der heilige Prozess meines großen Werkes erfordert einen gesegneten Zustrom von Antriebskraft und ist von größerer Bedeutung als die von den deaktivierten Systemen gestillten niederen Bedürfnisse der Crew. Im Namen des Wissens können zwei Module ein paar Wachen auch ohne Heizung aushalten."
languages.original_text: "The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."

traits.locale_text: "Der heilige Prozess meines großen Werkes erfordert einen gesegneten Zustrom von Antriebskraft und ist von größerer Bedeutung als die von den deaktivierten Systemen gestillten niederen Bedürfnisse der Crew. Im Namen des Wissens können zwei Module ein paar Wachen auch ohne Heizung aushalten."

languages.text: « L'accomplissement sacré de mon grand-œuvre exige la bénédiction de la Force Motrice, et ceci revêt une importance bien plus grande que les fonctions secondaires remplies par les systèmes désactivés. L'un ou l'autre compartiment peut bien accomplir quelques quarts sans chauffage, si cela sert un plus grand dessein. »
languages.original_text: "The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."

traits.locale_text: « L'accomplissement sacré de mon grand-œuvre exige la bénédiction de la Force Motrice, et ceci revêt une importance bien plus grande que les fonctions secondaires remplies par les systèmes désactivés. L'un ou l'autre compartiment peut bien accomplir quelques quarts sans chauffage, si cela sert un plus grand dessein. »

languages.text: "Büyük Çalışmamın kutsal süreci, Devinim Gücü'nün kutsanmış akışını gerektiriyor. Bu, mürettebatın devre dışı bırakılmış sistemlerce karşılanan küçük işlevsel ihtiyaçlarından daha önemli. Bir çift bölme, İrfan uğruna ısınma olmadan on iki nöbete dayanabilir."
languages.original_text: "The sacred process of my Great Work requires a blessed influx of Motive Force, and it is of greater importance than the crew's minor functional needs met by the disabled systems. A pair of compartments can endure a dozen watches without heating in the name of knowledge."

traits.locale_text: "Büyük Çalışmamın kutsal süreci, Devinim Gücü'nün kutsanmış akışını gerektiriyor. Bu, mürettebatın devre dışı bırakılmış sistemlerce karşılanan küçük işlevsel ihtiyaçlarından daha önemli. Bir çift bölme, İrfan uğruna ısınma olmadan on iki nöbete dayanabilir."
